DISCOVERY 612, AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFF JIMMY AHSLEY TAM'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $740.00. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LAU, BONNIE SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR NITZ, MONICA

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One,), Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctins Against Deft For Failure To Respond To Discovery; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael C. Hall, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Jimmy Ashley Tam
No other appearances.

After hearing, Plaintiff Jimmy Ahsley Tam's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One), And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Sanctions are awarded to plaintiff in the amount of $740.00. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
